action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2 frozen features achieved 0.4773 balanced accuracy, a huge improvement over ResNet50 and fine-tuned CLIP. The model is still learning (val acc improving). Analysis: We can improve this further by: 1) Training longer (15 epochs), 2) Using a better LR schedule (CosineAnnealingLR) with a slightly higher LR for the linear head, 3) Concatenating the CLS token with mean-pooled patch tokens for richer features, and 4) Adding Test-Time Augmentation (TTA) in predict.py. Decision: Update train.py and predict.py with these improvements, train for 15 epochs, and submit for evaluation.
